scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix fabrico-admin/backend && npm install --prefix fabrico-admin/admin-fabrico && npm install --prefix fabrico-client/server && npm install --prefix fabrico-client/client
scripts.install:admin: npm install --prefix fabrico-admin/backend && npm install --prefix fabrico-admin/admin-fabrico
scripts.install:client: npm install --prefix fabrico-client/server && npm install --prefix fabrico-client/client
scripts.install:delivery: npm install --prefix delivery-partner-fabrico/backend && npm install --prefix delivery-partner-fabrico/delivery-partner
scripts.start:admin: concurrently "npm start --prefix fabrico-admin/backend" "npm run dev --prefix fabrico-admin/admin-fabrico"
scripts.start:client: concurrently "npm start --prefix fabrico-client/server" "npm run dev --prefix fabrico-client/client"
